description: Phase 014: deferred closeout. 3 actionable items shipped (tracked copy-skill-advisor-dist-data.sh script, advisory pre-commit hook + install script for validate-doc-model-refs.js, Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD comment freshness in evidence-gap-detector.ts). 1 resolved no-op (node-llama-cpp dep prune; no live package.json declares it). 1 intentionally deferred (raising Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD 1.3 → 1.5; needs per-operator sidecar-presence probe). 5 files (3 new + 2 modified), ~115 net LOC.
